message:
feat(agent): pre-warmed JS runtime struct, S3-FIFO eviction fix, bash truncation line count

**Pre-warmed JS runtime (agent.rs):**
- Added PreWarmedJsRuntime struct to enable overlapping JS runtime boot
  (~50-500ms QuickJS init) with other startup work by spawning it as a
  background task before session creation and model selection
- Made runtime_repair_mode_from_policy_mode() pub for external access

**S3-FIFO eviction fix (hostcall_s3_fifo.rs):**
- Fixed enforce_live_capacity() eviction order: when both small and main
  queues have entries, evict from small first (was incorrectly evicting
  from main when small was non-empty)

**Bash truncation fix (tools.rs):**
- Set truncation.total_lines from bash_output.line_count (with +1 for
  off-by-one since line_count counts newlines, not lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
